purpose: Index of available slug-translation language files. Layer-1 defaults shipped with the platform. Default language at install time = en. Per-deployment override files (Layer 2) live under /etc/zorbit/<env>/slug-translations.<lang>.override.json. Runtime DB overrides (Layer 3) carry an explicit language column. Resolver merges Layer 3 > Layer 2 > Layer 1, with per-language fallback to defaultLanguage if a key is missing.
owner-directive-2026-04-28: Manifests stay slug-only AND language-agnostic. Never bake a language into a manifest. The SPA picks user language at request time and the navigation service serves the merged translations.
